title: The Man of Corruption : Corruption dweller
description: Man has been corrupted and he can see you...
body:
Man has been corrupted and he can see you. This mod will add a new variant of The Man from the Fog. “All credit goes to [M_Productions](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), who created the original mod.” So, Corrupted `-´ How many times have I said corrupted? Well, it doesn't matter here. Here are the things again :

also in CurseForge [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-man-of-corruption-by-cs0-productions)

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

[ -The Man of Corruption v1.0.0- ]

New animations :  stare , climb , crawl , jumpscare , crawl_2 .

News textures : stalker and stalker_glow , tear_of_the_man .

News sounds : chasedv2 , spawn1 , spawn-version-1 , spawn-version-2 , spawn-version-3 , look-version-1 , jumpscare . 

New Model

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

_________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

[ -The Man of Corruption v1.2.1-Beta- ]

animations remade : stare , climb , crawl , jumpscare , crawl_2 .

textures remade : stalker and stalker_glow .

model remade

adds random event

port to 1.20.1

_________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

I DO NOT RECOMMEND USING THIS MOD IN YOUR HARDCORE WORLD.

use this command to save your house /gamerule doFireTick false.

THIS MOD DOES NOT SUPPORT MULTIPLAYER.
________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Q : port to 1.20.1 ?

R : Yes.

________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

### Thank you for reading, and have a good horror experience. Don't forget!

[!!!NEED GECKOLIB!!!](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
